scripts.aw: sh -c 'if command -v bun >/dev/null 2>&1; then exec bun packages/agent-worker/src/cli/index.ts "$@"; else exec node --import tsx packages/agent-worker/src/cli/index.ts "$@"; fi' --
scripts.typecheck: tsgo -p packages/shared/tsconfig.json && tsgo -p packages/loop/tsconfig.json && tsgo -p packages/agent/tsconfig.json && tsgo -p packages/workspace/tsconfig.json && tsgo -p packages/agent-worker/tsconfig.json && tsgo -p packages/web/tsconfig.json
scripts.test: bun test packages/shared/src/event-bus.test.ts packages/loop/test packages/agent/test packages/workspace/test packages/agent-worker/test
